title: senecio englerianus
intro: Senecio englerianus, also known as Engler's ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and promoting digestion. Senecio englerianus is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, but it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
